steps.title: Substitute the dog count
steps.content:
The service cares for $32$ dogs, so substitute $d=32$ into the equation.
$$4.5c+9(32)=288$$

steps.title: Solve for cats
steps.content:
Simplify the equation. The dog term alone uses all $288$ units of weekly care capacity, so no capacity remains for cats.
$$4.5c+288=288$$
$$4.5c=0$$
$$c=0$$
The answer is A.
